events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: a non-rated (ordinary-location) fixture staged for a Class I, Division 2 area fails — it hasn't been evaluated/listed for the arc, spark, or hot-surface conditions classified equipment must control (NEC 500.8, 501.10(B)). Corrective action is to replace it with a Division 1 or 2-listed luminaire, verify the wiring method (rigid/IMC conduit or Division 2-listed MC-HL cable) and required seal-offs (501.15), and re-inspect before energizing.
